subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-12-31 in Abu Sinan
subcodes.first_line: I wish for you to go to Iran... Shaykhu'l-Islam is a simple, common man with no religious convictions. He is utterly ignorant of the religion of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: میخواهم شما را بایران بفرستم... شیخ الاسلام مرد بسیط عامی است و بی دین ابداً اعتنائی بدین الله ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @assistance to the poor and lowly; the orphan; the sick
